subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Mother Book speaketh forth, giving glad tidings unto all of this Revelation, through which the Dove of the Cause hath warbled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینطق ام الکتاب و یبشر الکل بهدا الظهور الذی به غردت حمامه الامر
